bounded_document_family: U.S. Government Accountability Office bid-protest decisions that identify a protest docket, procurement or solicitation, decision date, and compact current disposition.
recurring_anatomy: GAO bid-protest decisions identify a GAO docket or B-number and a source-stated decision date.
GAO bid-protest decisions identify the protest forum, protested procurement or solicitation, and one or more protest parties.
GAO bid-protest decisions state a compact current disposition such as sustained, denied, dismissed, denied in part, sustained in part, or not stated.

argument_roles.name: decision_id
argument_roles.purpose: Stable local id for one source-stated GAO bid-protest decision.

argument_roles.name: forum_id
argument_roles.purpose: Compact source-stated decision forum or deciding body atom.

argument_roles.name: docket_id
argument_roles.purpose: Source-stated GAO docket, B-number, or bid-protest file identifier atom.

argument_roles.name: procurement_id
argument_roles.purpose: Source-stated procurement, solicitation, RFQ, RFP, or contract identifier atom, or not_stated.

argument_roles.name: decision_date
argument_roles.purpose: Source-stated decision date as a date atom, or not_stated.

argument_roles.name: decision_status
argument_roles.purpose: Closed compact disposition of the protest decision wrapper.

argument_roles.name: source_or_scope
argument_roles.purpose: Source coordinate or governed scope atom.

positive_examples.fact: gao_bid_protest_decision(DecisionId, gao, DocketId, ProcurementId, DecisionDate, denied, Src).
gao_bid_protest_decision(DecisionId, gao, DocketId, not_stated, DecisionDate, sustained_in_part, Src).

forbidden_examples.fact: gao_bid_protest_decision(DecisionId, gao, DocketId, full_caption_or_decision_sentence_blob, DecisionDate, denied, Src).
gao_bid_protest_decision(DecisionId, gao, DocketId, ProcurementId, DecisionDate, protester_failed_to_demonstrate_unequal_treatment_full_phrase, Src).

unlike_transfer_plan.heldout_policy: unlike GAO bid-protest decisions not used to shape the wrapper carrier or value domains

abstention_boundary: Do not emit when the source lacks a GAO docket/B-number or decision date.

Do not use this carrier to preserve protest grounds, evaluation-factor merits, CPAR details, OCI analysis, recommendations, cost reimbursement, or legal reasoning; those require separate closed carriers.
Do not put the full caption, protest allegation, finding sentence, or recommendation text into any atom slot.
Do not infer the disposition from discussion snippets when the source states only procedural posture or background.

proposal_evidence.note: Local Qwen MoE profile-only bootstrap found GAO decision wrapper/procurement/evaluation anatomy but drifted on protest-ground, offeror-profile, and GAO-finding surfaces.
Local Qwen MoE profile-only bootstrap found the same GAO decision wrapper/procurement/protest anatomy with one timeliness-value warning.
